subject: GDPR Article 15 Data Export Request - Acme Corp (ACC-2847)
body:
Hi Data Ops team,

Please process a data subject access request (GDPR Article 15) for client account ACC-2847 (Acme Corp).

Request Details:
- Account ID: ACC-2847
- Response Deadline: 14 days from receipt

This is a data export request and should be handled according to our standard GDPR compliance procedures. No personal data or client details are included in this internal routing.

Please confirm receipt and provide status updates as needed.

Thanks,
Internal Communications
